description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted radiator featuring a series of vertical panels arranged side by side, each panel painted in a gradient from deep red on the left to pale yellow on the right. The radiator is mounted on a rectangular white backing plate, which provides a clean and minimalistic appearance. The panels are flat and evenly spaced, with visible separation lines between each color segment. At the bottom left, there is a visible pipe connection and a small valve, suggesting manual control. The surface of the radiator panels appears smooth and hard, likely made of metal for efficient heat transfer. The overall design is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A wall-mounted radiator with vertical colored panels in a red-to-yellow gradient, set on a white backing plate. Features a visible pipe connection and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full gradient of colored vertical panels and the white backing plate, with the pipe connection visible at the bottom left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the radiator and the protrusion of the colored panels from the backing plate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the plain white backing plate, with no visible radiator panels or connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the radiator and the colored panels extending outward from the backing plate.
attribute_pipe_connections: one visible at bottom left, horizontal orientation
